title: Talking About Family 谈论家庭
scene: 两个新认识的同学互相介绍自己的家庭。

lines.en: David, do you have a big family?
lines.zh: 大卫，你有一个大家庭吗？

lines.en: Not really. There are four people in my family.
My dad, my mom, my sister and me.
lines.zh: 我爸爸、我妈妈、我姐姐和我。
你爸爸是做什么工作的？

lines.en: He's a teacher. He teaches math at a high school.
lines.zh: 他是一名老师。他在高中教数学。

lines.en: That's nice! What about your mom?
She's a nurse. She works at the city hospital.
lines.zh: 她是一名护士。她在市医院工作。

lines.en: Wow! I have three people in my family. Just my parents and me.
lines.zh: 哇！我家有三口人。只有我爸妈和我。

lines.en: That's a small and happy family!
lines.zh: 那是一个温馨的小家庭！
